AISIS Enlistment Portal

1st Sem, SY 2026-2027 · 2Y enlistment Jul 9, 8:00 AM

Paste your AISIS pre-enlistment page

On enlistment day, open Enlist in Class on AISIS, select-all (⌘A) and copy (⌘C) the page, then paste here. The parser finds every Subject Code + Section pair, maps it to the live schedule, and marks those hours as taken. Works with partial pastes too.

Enlisted / taken classes (these block the grid)

Weekly grid

Gray = taken/pre-enlisted · hatched red = your blocked times · colors = selected suggestion. "-" = both days (T-F = Tue & Fri).
